description: Spice up your style with this fashionable, yet spacious, brown wallet from fastrack. While it's well organised to allow you to carry a lot of your essentials conveniently, it looks perfectly fabulous with any outfit, upping your style statement.Dimensions: 11.5 cm x 8.5 cmTextured leather upper with stitch detail and embossed branding on the frontRivet detail for styleTwo main compartments with fabric innerFour card holder slots on either side of the walletOne slip pocket on either side of the walletCareWipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
